name: financial-tracker
description: A wealth and budget monitoring dashboard engineered to ingest thousands of transactions, calculate historical trends via advanced SQL aggregation, and fetch real-time market data through background task scheduling.

scripts.dev: concurrently -c "cyan,magenta" -n "WEB,API" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run start:dev -w apps/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api"
